title: glow-lab-skincare
brief: Glow Lab premium skincare. Hero product: amber glass dropper serum bottle. Campaign for Instagram and digital ads. Golden morning light, minimal white/cream spaces. One model: blonde woman, blue-green eyes, no makeup, real skin. Warm, intimate, aspirational but not untouchable. Think Aesop meets Glossier.

clips.prompt: Woman applying serum to her cheek with the glass dropper, morning bathroom light, close-up on her face and hand, natural relaxed expression, Instagram skincare campaign
The amber glass serum bottle on a white marble bathroom counter, morning light catching the golden liquid inside, water droplets on the marble, minimal product photography for Instagram
Woman massaging serum into her jawline with her eyes closed, bare shoulders, soft natural light from a window, peaceful morning skincare moment, beauty campaign close-up
The amber serum bottle and a fresh eucalyptus sprig on rumpled white linen, overhead morning light, clean editorial flat lay for Instagram
Woman holding the serum bottle close to her face, looking at camera with a slight smile, soft window light, intimate product-in-hand moment for digital ad campaign
Close-up of woman's glowing neck and collarbone after applying serum, dewy skin catching warm sidelight, hair swept to one side, beauty texture shot for skincare campaign
